item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested local submission-page reminder, frames the prior late/missing-attachment/format/page-number issues as a repeated overlay-repair pattern, and moves upstream to a unified submission-completion definition and acceptance mechanism.
